what_changed: Rejected duplicate request chunk ids within one document or legacy restaurant chunk-map selection, comparing ids after the same string coercion used by planner cache keys.
why: Serving requests should not ask the planner to materialize the same generated cache key twice in one document selection; rejecting this at request normalization keeps arbitrary document and legacy restaurant paths deterministic.
